name: kitsune
description: AI-powered PR-based migration guide generator. Analyzes a sample PR, asks clarifying questions, and generates a comprehensive, AI-ready migration guide for your entire codebase.

chatParticipants.name: kitsune
chatParticipants.description: Analyze a PR as a migration sample, ask clarifying questions, and generate an AI-ready migration playbook.

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Provide a PR/MR URL to analyze as a migration sample

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate the migration guide from collected answers

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan workspace to count migration targets

kitsune.github.token.markdownDescription: GitHub personal access token for accessing private repositories. Create one at https://github.com/settings/tokens

kitsune.azureDevOps.token.markdownDescription: Azure DevOps personal access token (PAT). Create one at https://dev.azure.com

kitsune.gitlab.token.markdownDescription: GitLab personal access token. Create one at your GitLab instance under User Settings > Access Tokens

kitsune.bitbucket.appPassword.markdownDescription: Bitbucket app password. Create one at https://bitbucket.org/account/settings/app-passwords/

kitsune.outputDirectory.description: Workspace-relative directory where migration guides are saved

kitsune.questionsPerBatch.description: How many clarifying questions to ask per conversation turn
